name: Tamura's Fine Wine & Liquors
tagline: Walk into a wine shop, walk out with the best poke in Kailua — trust the process.
mustOrder: garlic shrimp poke (hard to find elsewhere)
parking: Ample parking at Aikahi Park Shopping Center
talkStory: The Tamura family has run this Kailua wine and liquor shop for decades, but the poke counter they added became equally legendary. They cure and season their own poke in-house — the spicy ahi is the top seller. The local move: grab a pound of poke plus a bottle of wine, then drive five minutes to Kailua Beach for sunset. You can taste before buying. Best selection before 1pm when the fresh batches are still full.
